title: Bakeries
body:
# Description
Bakeries is a Mod that lets you make and eat baked goods in the game.![The added content by Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f92a7b543a5de4933078317b9974983abf10c6a_0.webp)
# Mod Content
The module has added a large number of bread and cake items, all of which can be placed!
# Module Guidance
 You can open the progress page and follow the progress to play. If you have installed the[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli), you can view the built-in tutorial book of the module.
# FQA
Q: Why is my bread 32X texture?
A: The default texture of the module is 32X. If you're not accustomed to it, the module comes with a 16X texture replacement pack, which you can load in the resource pack interface.
Q: Can this module be used in the integration package?
A: Of course! You can freely add a bakery to the integration package. Remember:
Make sure to indicate the source and do not claim that the baking workshop is your own creation.
Q: Which game versions will this module continue to be updated for?
A: Version 1.20.1 or higher. For the time being, the mod does not consider backward compatibility.
